controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regulation of payment aggregators) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regulation of
Payment Aggregators) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regulation of payment aggregators) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effective immediately unless indicated otherwise for any specific provision herein
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be effective immediately unless indicated otherwise for
any specific provision herein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effective immediately unless indicated otherwise for any specific provision herein

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to all bank and non-bank entities undertaking the business of payment aggregator (pa) as defined herein
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall apply to all bank and non-bank entities undertaking the
business of Payment Aggregator (PA) as defined herein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to all bank and non-bank entities undertaking the business of payment aggregator (pa) as defined herein

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to all authorised dealer banks as well as scheduled commercial banks which engage with entities undertaking pa business, to the extent here
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall
also apply to all Authorised Dealer banks as well as Scheduled Commercial
Banks which engage with entities undertaking PA business, to the extent
hereinafter specified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to all authorised dealer banks as well as scheduled commercial banks which engage with entities undertaking pa business, to the extent here

controls.control_objective: To ensure include network of computers, television channels and any other internet application used in automated manner such as web pages, extranets, mobiles, e
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For the purposes of this definition, the term 'digital & electronic
network' shall include network of computers, television channels and any other
internet application used in automated manner such as web pages, extranets,
mobiles, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include network of computers, television channels and any other internet application used in automated manner such as web pages, extranets, mobiles, e

controls.control_objective: To ensure under fema, for its onboarded merchants through e-commerce mode
controls.control_description:
PA - Cross Border (PA - CB): PA that facilitates aggregation of
cross-border payments for current account transactions, that are not
prohibited under FEMA, for its onboarded merchants through
e-commerce mode.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to under fema, for its onboarded merchants through e-commerce mode

controls.control_objective: To ensure fall within the purview of pa - cb business
controls.control_description:
There are two sub-categories of PA-CB:
a) PA-CB facilitating inward transaction
b) PA-CB facilitating outward transaction
Note: (1) A non-bank entity authorised as AD Category-II, and
facilitating current account transactions not prohibited under FEMA
(other than purchase or sale of goods or service), shall not fall within
the purview of PA - CB business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fall within the purview of pa - cb business

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meanings as defined in rbi master direction dbr
controls.control_description:
Central KYC Records Registry (CKYCR), Officially Valid Document (OVD),
equivalent e-document, digital KYC, and Video-based Customer Identification
Procedure (V-CIP) shall have the same meanings as defined in RBI Master
Direction DBR.AML.BC.No.81/14.01.001/2015-16 dated February 25, 2016 on
'Master Direction - Know Your Customer (KYC) Direction, 2016', as amended
from time to time (hereinafter referred to as 'MD on KYC').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meanings as defined in rbi master direction dbr

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek authorisation for operating as a pa by submitting an application through rbi's online portal
controls.control_description:
A non- bank entity shall seek authorisation for operating as a PA by submitting
an application through RBI's online portal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek authorisation for operating as a pa by submitting an application through rbi's online portal

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply along with a 'no objection certificate' (noc) from such regulator(s), within 45 days of obtaining the noc
controls.control_description:
An entity, regulated by any of the
financial sector regulator(s), shall apply along with a 'No Objection Certificate'
(NOC) from such regulator(s), within 45 days of obtaining the NOC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply along with a 'no objection certificate' (noc) from such regulator(s), within 45 days of obtaining the noc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a company incorporated in india under the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
A non-bank PA shall be a company incorporated in India under the
Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a company incorporated in india under the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the proposed activity of operating as a pa
controls.control_description:
The Memorandum of Association of the applicant
entity should cover the proposed activity of operating as a PA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the proposed activity of operating as a pa

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate rbi
controls.control_description:
A PA having a Certificate of Authorisation (CoA) issued by RBI, and
a) already carrying on business as a PA-P - shall intimate RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued to the pa
controls.control_description: A revised CoA shall be issued to the PA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued to the pa

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate rbi at least 30 days prior to commencing the new business
controls.control_description:
b) desirous of commencing business in another PA category -
shall intimate RBI at least 30 days prior to commencing the
new business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate rbi at least 30 days prior to commencing the new business

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate the reserve bank about its existing pa-p business
controls.control_description:
An entity, whose application for grant of CoA for PA-O or PA - CB
is under consideration of RBI - shall intimate the Reserve Bank
about its existing PA-P business, if any, through the online portal,
by December 31, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate the reserve bank about its existing pa-p business

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply for authorisation as prescribed in 5 (b) above, by december 31, 2025
controls.control_description:
An entity carrying on only PA-P business shall apply for
authorisation as prescribed in 5 (b) above, by December 31, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply for authorisation as prescribed in 5 (b) above, by december 31, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate its banker(s) forthwith and wind up its business by february 28, 2026
controls.control_description:
An entity which fails to apply by the due date shall intimate its
banker(s) forthwith and wind up its business by February 28, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate its banker(s) forthwith and wind up its business by february 28, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure be returned
controls.control_description:
Application of an entity, not meeting the minimum capital requirement, or
which is incomplete / not in the prescribed form, shall be returned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be returned

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum net-worth of ₹15 crore at the time of tendering application for authorisation
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum net-worth of ₹15 crore at the time of tendering application for authorisation

controls.control_objective: To ensure attain a minimum net-worth of ₹25 crore by the end of third financial year of grant of authorisation
controls.control_description:
and shall attain a minimum net-worth of ₹25 crore by the
end of third financial year of grant of authorisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attain a minimum net-worth of ₹25 crore by the end of third financial year of grant of authorisation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained by a pa on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description:
The minimum networth, as applicable, shall be maintained by a PA on an
ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained by a pa on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the directions in rbi circular dpss
controls.control_description:
For the purposes of this MD, computation of net worth of an entity shall be
guided by the directions in RBI circular DPSS.CO.AD.No.1344
02.27.005/2014-15 dated January 16, 2015 on 'Computation of Net-worth',
as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the directions in rbi circular dpss

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include preference shares that are compulsorily convertible to equity
controls.control_description:
In addition to the items provided in the said
circular, "net worth" shall also include preference shares that are compulsorily
convertible to equity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include preference shares that are compulsorily convertible to equity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compulsorily convertible into equity shares and the shareholder agreements should specifically prohibit any withdrawal of this preference share cap
controls.control_description:
Compulsorily convertible preference shares can be
either non-cumulative or cumulative, and they should be compulsorily
convertible into equity shares and the shareholder agreements should
specifically prohibit any withdrawal of this preference share capital at any
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compulsorily convertible into equity shares and the shareholder agreements should specifically prohibit any withdrawal of this preference share cap

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deducted while arriving at the net-worth value
controls.control_description:
Additionally, if Deferred Tax Assets have been included in any of the
components, the same shall be deducted while arriving at the net-worth value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deducted while arriving at the net-worth value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the consolidated fdi policy of the government of india, and the relevant foreign exchange management regulations on this subject
controls.control_description:
An entity, having Foreign Direct Investment (FDI), shall be guided by the
Consolidated FDI Policy of the Government of India, and the relevant Foreign
Exchange Management Regulations on this subject.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by the consolidated fdi policy of the government of india, and the relevant foreign exchange management regulations on this subject

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a certificate in the enclosed format (annexure 2
controls.control_description:
An entity seeking PA authorisation shall submit a certificate in the enclosed
format (Annexure 2.1) from their statutory auditor evidencing compliance with
the applicable net-worth requirement while submitting the application for
authorisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a certificate in the enclosed format (annexure 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a certificate in the enclosed format from their statutory auditor regarding current networth along with a provisional balance sheet as of recen
controls.control_description:
A newly incorporated non-bank entity which may not have an
audited statement of financial accounts shall submit a certificate in the
enclosed format from their statutory auditor regarding current networth along
with a provisional balance sheet as of recent date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a certificate in the enclosed format from their statutory auditor regarding current networth along with a provisional balance sheet as of recen

controls.control_objective: To ensure be professionally managed
controls.control_description: A PA shall be professionally managed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be professionally managed

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy the fit and proper criteria as below: i
controls.control_description:
The promoters and directors of the
entity shall satisfy the fit and proper criteria as below:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy the fit and proper criteria as below: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a declaration in the enclosed format (annexure 2
controls.control_description:
The promoters and directors of the applicant entity may submit a declaration
in the enclosed format (Annexure 2.5).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a declaration in the enclosed format (annexure 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure also check 'fit and proper' status of the applicant entity and management thereof by obtaining inputs from other regulators, government departments, e
controls.control_description:
RBI may also check 'fit and proper'
status of the applicant entity and management thereof by obtaining inputs
from other regulators, government departments, etc., as deemed fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also check 'fit and proper' status of the applicant entity and management thereof by obtaining inputs from other regulators, government departments, e

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final
controls.control_description:
As
regards fulfilment of 'fit and proper' criteria, RBI's decision shall be final.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to rbi circular co
controls.control_description:
Any takeover or acquisition of control or change in the management of a non-
bank PA shall adhere to RBI circular CO.DPSS.POLC.No.S-590/02-14-
006/2022-23 dated July 4, 2022 on 'Requirement for obtaining prior approval
in case of takeover / acquisition of control of non-bank PSOs and sale /
transfer of payment system activity of non-bank PSO', as amended from time
to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to rbi circular co

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to an entity whose application for authorisation as pa is pending with rbi
controls.control_description:
This provision shall also apply to an entity whose application for
authorisation as PA is pending with RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to an entity whose application for authorisation as pa is pending with rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a dispute resolution mechanism to handle payment related disputes in transactions facilitated by it
controls.control_description:
A PA shall have a dispute resolution mechanism to handle payment related
disputes in transactions facilitated by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a dispute resolution mechanism to handle payment related disputes in transactions facilitated by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include timelines for processing refunds, etc
controls.control_description:
The mechanism should also include
timelines for processing refunds, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include timelines for processing refunds, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure adherence to the instructions issued by rbi including on turn around time (tat) for resolution of failed transactions issued vide dpss
controls.control_description:
The policy shall ensure adherence to
the instructions issued by RBI including on Turn Around Time (TAT) for
resolution of failed transactions issued vide DPSS.CO.PD
No.629/02.01.014/2019-20 dated September 20, 2019 (as amended from
time to time).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure adherence to the instructions issued by rbi including on turn around time (tat) for resolution of failed transactions issued vide dpss

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly delineate the roles and responsibilities of the involved parties, inter alia covering manner of refunds, treatment of failed transactions, ret
controls.control_description:
Agreements between a PA, its merchants, its acquiring banks, and all other
stakeholders shall clearly delineate the roles and responsibilities of the
involved parties, inter alia covering manner of refunds, treatment of failed
transactions, return policy, grievance redressal, reconciliation, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly delineate the roles and responsibilities of the involved parties, inter alia covering manner of refunds, treatment of failed transactions, ret

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose comprehensive information regarding its merchant policies, privacy policy and other terms and conditions on its website and / or its mobile a
controls.control_description:
The PA shall disclose comprehensive information regarding its merchant
policies, privacy policy and other terms and conditions on its website and / or
its mobile application.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to disclose comprehensive information regarding its merchant policies, privacy policy and other terms and conditions on its website and / or its mobile a

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint an officer responsible for responding to issues raised by its merchants along with an escalation matrix for grievance redressal
controls.control_description:
The PA shall appoint an officer responsible for responding to issues raised by
its merchants along with an escalation matrix for grievance redressal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint an officer responsible for responding to issues raised by its merchants along with an escalation matrix for grievance redressal

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prominently displayed on its website
controls.control_description:
Details
of the officer and escalation matrix shall be prominently displayed on its
website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prominently displayed on its website

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place adequate information and data security infrastructure and systems for detection and prevention of frauds
controls.control_description:
PA shall put in place adequate
Information and Data Security infrastructure and systems for detection and
prevention of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place adequate information and data security infrastructure and systems for detection and prevention of frauds

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that infrastructure of the merchants is compliant with security standards like pci-dss and pci-ssf, as may be applicable
controls.control_description:
PA shall ensure that infrastructure of the merchants is
compliant with security standards like PCI-DSS and PCI-SSF, as may be
applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that infrastructure of the merchants is compliant with security standards like pci-dss and pci-ssf, as may be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board approved information security policy for safety and security of the payment systems operated by it and implement security measure
controls.control_description:
PA shall put in place a Board approved Information Security Policy for safety
and security of the payment systems operated by it and implement security
measures in accordance with the said policy to mitigate identified as well as
emerging risks.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board approved information security policy for safety and security of the payment systems operated by it and implement security measure

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure adherence to baseline technology-related recommendations as provided in annexure 1
controls.control_description:
PA shall ensure adherence to baseline technology-related
recommendations as provided in Annexure 1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure adherence to baseline technology-related recommendations as provided in annexure 1

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with data storage requirements as applicable to payment system operators (psos) as laid out in rbi circular dpss
controls.control_description:
PA shall comply with data storage requirements as applicable to Payment
System Operators (PSOs) as laid out in RBI circular DPSS.CO.OD
No.2785/06.08.005/2017-2018 dated April 6, 2018 on 'Storage of Payment
System Data', as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with data storage requirements as applicable to payment system operators (psos) as laid out in rbi circular dpss

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out and report thereof shall be submitted to the respective regional office of dpss, rbi within such timelines as may be prescribed by rbi
controls.control_description:
An annual system audit, including cyber security audit, conducted by CERT-
In empanelled auditors shall be carried out and report thereof shall be
submitted to the respective Regional Office of DPSS, RBI within such
timelines as may be prescribed by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be carried out and report thereof shall be submitted to the respective regional office of dpss, rbi within such timelines as may be prescribed by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by rbi circular co
controls.control_description:
The PA shall also be guided by RBI circular CO.DPSS.OVRST.No.S447/06-
26-002/2024-25 dated July 30, 2024 on 'Master Directions on Cyber
Resilience and Digital Payment Security Controls for non-bank Payment
System Operators', as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by rbi circular co

controls.control_objective: To ensure aggregate funds only for the merchant with whom it has a contractual relationship
controls.control_description:
A PA shall aggregate funds only for the merchant with whom it has a contractual
relationship.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to aggregate funds only for the merchant with whom it has a contractual relationship

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out marketplace business
controls.control_description: A PA business shall not carry out marketplace business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out marketplace business

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the extant instructions with regard to merchant discount rate (mdr) are followed
controls.control_description:
A PA shall ensure that the extant instructions with regard to Merchant Discount
Rate (MDR) are followed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the extant instructions with regard to merchant discount rate (mdr) are followed

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that any charges, other than the price of goods / service / investment amount, charged by a merchant, are distinctly displayed to the paye
controls.control_description:
A PA shall also ensure that any charges, other than
the price of goods / service / investment amount, charged by a merchant, are
distinctly displayed to the payer prior to the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that any charges, other than the price of goods / service / investment amount, charged by a merchant, are distinctly displayed to the paye

controls.control_objective: To ensure place limits on transaction amount for a particular payment mode
controls.control_description:
A PA shall not place limits on transaction amount for a particular payment
mode.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to place limits on transaction amount for a particular payment mode

controls.control_objective: To ensure lie with the issuing bank / non-bank entity
controls.control_description: The responsibility thereof shall lie with the issuing bank / non-bank entity;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lie with the issuing bank / non-bank entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for placing transaction amount limits on cards issued by it based on the customer's credit worthiness, spending nature, profile, etc
controls.control_description:
for instance, the card issuing bank shall be responsible for placing transaction
amount limits on cards issued by it based on the customer's credit worthiness,
spending nature, profile, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for placing transaction amount limits on cards issued by it based on the customer's credit worthiness, spending nature, profile, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure give an option for atm pin as a factor of authentication for card- not-present transactions
controls.control_description:
A PA shall not give an option for ATM PIN as a factor of authentication for card-
not-present transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give an option for atm pin as a factor of authentication for card- not-present transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to the original method of payment
controls.control_description:
All refunds shall be made to the original method of payment, unless specifically
instructed by the payer to credit the refund to an alternate mode belonging to
the same payer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to the original method of payment

controls.control_objective: To ensure fall within the scope of this md
controls.control_description: A PG, as defined in paragraph 4(j), shall not fall within the scope of this MD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fall within the scope of this md

controls.control_objective: To ensure avail services of a pg in terms of rbi circulars dos
controls.control_description:
A PA may avail services of a PG in terms of RBI circulars
DoS.CO.CSITEG/SEC.1/31.01.015/2023-24 dated April 10, 2023 on 'Master
Direction on Information Technology Services', CO.DPSS.POLC.No.S-
384/02.32.001/2021-2022 dated August 3, 2021 on 'Framework for
Outsourcing of Payment and Settlement-related Activities by Payment System
Operators', and DBOD.NO.BP.40/21.04.158/2006-07 dated November 3, 2006
on 'Managing Risks and Code of Conduct in Outsourcing of Financial Services
by banks', as applicable and amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to avail services of a pg in terms of rbi circulars dos

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept separate
controls.control_description:
Funds related to inward and outward transactions as carried out by a PA-CB
shall be kept separate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept separate

controls.control_objective: To ensure directly on-board merchants located abroad or enter into agreement with e-commerce marketplaces or entities providing pa services abroad
controls.control_description:
For outward transactions, a PA - CB may directly on-board merchants located
abroad or enter into agreement with e-commerce marketplaces or entities
providing PA services abroad.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to directly on-board merchants located abroad or enter into agreement with e-commerce marketplaces or entities providing pa services abroad

controls.control_objective: To ensure purchase foreign currency from, or sell it to, any entity other than an authorised dealer (ad)
controls.control_description:
A PA-CB shall not purchase foreign currency from, or sell it to, any entity other
than an Authorised Dealer (AD).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to purchase foreign currency from, or sell it to, any entity other than an authorised dealer (ad)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹25 lakh
controls.control_description:
In respect of inward or outward transactions
processed by a PA - CB, the maximum value per transaction shall be ₹25 lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹25 lakh

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all requirements under fema are adhered to
controls.control_description:
below of this MD,
shall ensure that all requirements under FEMA are adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all requirements under fema are adhered to

controls.control_objective: To ensure have automated processes to fetch the requisite information from a pa - cb
controls.control_description:
AD-I Bank shall have automated processes to fetch the requisite information
from a PA - CB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have automated processes to fetch the requisite information from a pa - cb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identified as a cross-border transaction
controls.control_description:
To establish the bonafides of a transaction, the payment transaction (outward /
inward) shall be identified as a cross-border transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identified as a cross-border transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure make provisions for implementation of the same from such timelines as specified by rbi
controls.control_description:
A Payment System
Provider shall make provisions for implementation of the same from such
timelines as specified by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make provisions for implementation of the same from such timelines as specified by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide the documents / information required by the exporter / importer to the ad bank of the exporter / importer, for closure of their corresponding entry in export data processing and monitoring system (edpms) / import data processing and management system (idpms)
controls.control_description:
PA - CB shall provide the documents / information required by the exporter /
importer to the AD bank of the exporter / importer, for closure of their
corresponding entry in Export Data Processing and Monitoring System
(EDPMS) / Import Data Processing and Management System (IDPMS),
wherever applicable, (for the respective inward / outward remittance), in
compliance with the extant directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide the documents / information required by the exporter / importer to the ad bank of the exporter / importer, for closure of their corresponding entry in export data processing and monitoring system (edpms) / import data processing and management system (idpms)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted only for those merchants (indian exporters) which have been directly onboarded by the pa - cb facilitating inward transactions
controls.control_description:
Settlement in non-INR currencies shall be permitted only for those merchants
(Indian exporters) which have been directly onboarded by the PA - CB
facilitating inward transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted only for those merchants (indian exporters) which have been directly onboarded by the pa - cb facilitating inward transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit reports as listed in annexure 2 of this md
controls.control_description:
Reports
An authorised PA shall submit reports as listed in Annexure 2 of this MD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit reports as listed in annexure 2 of this md

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake customer due diligence (cdd) of its merchants in accordance with md on kyc
controls.control_description:
A PA shall undertake customer due diligence (CDD) of its merchants in
accordance with MD on KYC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake customer due diligence (cdd) of its merchants in accordance with md on kyc

controls.control_objective: To ensure , with the merchant's consent, retrieve the merchant's kyc record from ckycr
controls.control_description:
While onboarding, the PA shall, with the merchant's
consent, retrieve the merchant's KYC record from CKYCR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , with the merchant's consent, retrieve the merchant's kyc record from ckycr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed in case ckycr record is found to be not updated
controls.control_description:
The process defined
in MD on KYC should be followed in case CKYCR record is found to be not
updated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed in case ckycr record is found to be not updated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be verified
controls.control_description:
One of the documents or the equivalent e-documents, as
prescribed for CDD of sole-proprietary firms or legal entities, should be
verified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be verified

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake background and antecedent check of the merchant
controls.control_description: A PA shall undertake background and antecedent check of the merchant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake background and antecedent check of the merchant

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate allotment of appropriate merchant category code and merchant id / terminal id to its merchants including those onboarded through an oversea
controls.control_description:
PA shall facilitate allotment of appropriate Merchant Category Code and
Merchant ID / Terminal ID to its merchants including those onboarded through an
overseas PA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate allotment of appropriate merchant category code and merchant id / terminal id to its merchants including those onboarded through an oversea

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that name of the merchant is captured appropriately for all transactions processed for it
controls.control_description:
PA shall ensure that name of the merchant is captured
appropriately for all transactions processed for it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that name of the merchant is captured appropriately for all transactions processed for it

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a marketplace onboarded by it does not accept payments for a seller not onboarded on to the marketplace's platform
controls.control_description:
A PA shall ensure that a marketplace onboarded by it does not accept payments
for a seller not onboarded on to the marketplace's platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a marketplace onboarded by it does not accept payments for a seller not onboarded on to the marketplace's platform

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place by a pa to ensure that funds due to a merchant are credited in the merchant's bank account only
controls.control_description:
Necessary validation mechanisms shall be put in place by a PA to ensure that
funds due to a merchant are credited in the merchant's bank account only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place by a pa to ensure that funds due to a merchant are credited in the merchant's bank account only

controls.control_objective: To ensure also monitor transactions subsequently undertaken by the merchants to ensure that these transactions are in line with latter's business profile and en
controls.control_description:
The PA must also monitor transactions subsequently undertaken by the
merchants to ensure that these transactions are in line with latter's business
profile and ensure adherence to other aspects of MD on KYC while conducting
its operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also monitor transactions subsequently undertaken by the merchants to ensure that these transactions are in line with latter's business profile and en

controls.control_objective: To ensure register itself with the financial intelligence unit-india (fiu- ind) in compliance with md on kyc and meet the reporting requirements listed therein
controls.control_description:
Non-bank PA shall register itself with the Financial Intelligence Unit-India (FIU-
IND) in compliance with MD on KYC and meet the reporting requirements listed
therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to register itself with the financial intelligence unit-india (fiu- ind) in compliance with md on kyc and meet the reporting requirements listed therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that merchants onboarded till december 31, 2025, comply with the above due diligence requirements within one year from the date of this md
controls.control_description:
A PA, including an existing PA whose application is pending with Reserve Bank
of India for authorisation, shall ensure that merchants onboarded till December
31, 2025, comply with the above due diligence requirements within one year from
the date of this MD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that merchants onboarded till december 31, 2025, comply with the above due diligence requirements within one year from the date of this md

controls.control_objective: To ensure be onboarded in accordance with due diligence requirements prescribed in this md
controls.control_description:
From January 1, 2026, merchants should be onboarded in
accordance with due diligence requirements prescribed in this MD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be onboarded in accordance with due diligence requirements prescribed in this md

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a policy for processing payments for merchants acquired through an authorised non-bank pa
controls.control_description:
Acquiring bank shall have a policy for processing payments for merchants
acquired through an authorised non-bank PA.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a policy for processing payments for merchants acquired through an authorised non-bank pa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be able to obtain the required details whenever required
controls.control_description:
Acquiring bank need not undertake the customer due diligence of the
merchant itself but should be able to obtain the required details whenever
required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be able to obtain the required details whenever required

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that merchants onboarded by the pa are in compliance with acquiring bank's policy for merchant acquiring
controls.control_description:
Acquiring Bank of a non-bank PA shall ensure that merchants onboarded by
the PA are in compliance with acquiring bank's policy for merchant acquiring.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure that merchants onboarded by the pa are in compliance with acquiring bank's policy for merchant acquiring

controls.control_objective: To ensure utilise agents to undertake the following activities related to due diligence of merchants: i
controls.control_description:
A non-bank PA may utilise agents to undertake the following activities related
to due diligence of merchants:
i.

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain the details of the agent assisting the merchant
controls.control_description:
PA shall maintain the details of the agent
assisting the merchant, where services of such agents are
employed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain the details of the agent assisting the merchant

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out due diligence of the persons appointed as authorised / designated agents
controls.control_description:
The non-bank PA shall carry out due diligence of the persons appointed as
authorised / designated agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out due diligence of the persons appointed as authorised / designated agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure lie on pa and agents can only be used for limited purposes as prescribed above
controls.control_description:
The ultimate responsibility of due diligence shall lie on PA and agents can only
be used for limited purposes as prescribed above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lie on pa and agents can only be used for limited purposes as prescribed above

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain the funds collected on behalf of its merchants in a separate escrow account with any scheduled commercial bank (scb) in india
controls.control_description:
A non-bank PA shall maintain the funds collected on behalf of its merchants
in a separate escrow account with any Scheduled Commercial Bank (SCB) in
India.

controls.control_description:

Collection Account (InCA) for inward transactions and Outward Collection

Details of operations
in escrow accounts are incorporated in Table 1 below and the instructions
mentioned therein must be adhered to by December 31, 2025.

business.

Additional Escrow Account (at the discretion of PA)

controls.control_description:
Inter-escrow A/c transfer
One additional account may be maintained in a different SCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained in a different scb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained in a different scb (for each currency)
controls.control_description: One additional account may be maintained in a different SCB (for each currency).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained in a different scb (for each currency)

controls.control_description: Note: This permitted debit shall not be used to transfer funds from an entity acting as a BBPOU, as defined in Master Direction on BBPS to its BBPS escrow account except in case where the entity acts as a PA to an Agent Institution and on its behalf transfers funds to the BBPS escrow account of the BBPOU.

controls.control_description:
Maintenance of day end balance in escrow account
Shall not be less than the amount realised in escrow towards funds payable to the merchants, but not settled to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than the amount realised in escrow towards funds payable to the merchants, but not settled to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure be payable on the balances maintained in the escrow account(s) except on the core portion amount of the domestic escrow account
controls.control_description: Interest-bearing No interest shall be payable on the balances maintained in the escrow account(s) except on the core portion amount of the domestic escrow account, subject to the conditions prescribed in paragraph 17 below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be payable on the balances maintained in the escrow account(s) except on the core portion amount of the domestic escrow account

controls.control_description: No interest shall be payable on the balances.

controls.control_description: PA may migrate funds to an escrow account prior to authorisation but protection under paragraph 16 (b) of these Directions shall be available only after authorisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available only after authorisation

controls.control_description: Such an agreement should be fair, equitable and must transparently mention the settlement timelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fair, equitable and must transparently mention the settlement timelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the same escrow account for both the business activities
controls.control_description: Note: (a) An entity authorised to carry out PA-O and PA-P businesses shall use the same escrow account for both the business activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the same escrow account for both the business activities

Step 1: Compute lowest daily outstanding balance (LB) in the escrow account on a fortnightly (FN) basis, for 26 fortnights from the preceding month.

controls.control_description:
For the purposes of maintenance of an escrow account, payment system operated
by PA shall be deemed to be 'designated payment systems' under Section 23A of
the Payment and Settlements Systems Act, 2007.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be 'designated payment systems' under section 23a of the payment and settlements systems act, 2007

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be maintained within the escrow account maintained for pa activity
controls.control_description:
The core portion of escrow account shall continue to be maintained within the escrow
account maintained for PA activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be maintained within the escrow account maintained for pa activity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permissible to entities who have been in business for twenty-six (26) fortnights and whose accounts have been duly audited for the full accounting
controls.control_description:
This facility shall be permissible to entities who have been in business for twenty-six
(26) fortnights and whose accounts have been duly audited for the full accounting
year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permissible to entities who have been in business for twenty-six (26) fortnights and whose accounts have been duly audited for the full accounting

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated from the date of actual business operation in the account
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, the period of twenty-six fortnights shall be calculated from the
date of actual business operation in the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated from the date of actual business operation in the account

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue any receipt for such deposits which may entitle pa to the funds available in the core portion or mark any lien on the amount held in such form o
controls.control_description:
Banks shall not issue any receipt for
such deposits which may entitle PA to the funds available in the core portion or mark
any lien on the amount held in such form of deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue any receipt for such deposits which may entitle pa to the funds available in the core portion or mark any lien on the amount held in such form o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated separately for each escrow account
controls.control_description: The core portion shall be calculated separately for each escrow account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated separately for each escrow account

controls.control_description:
The escrow
balance maintained shall be clearly disclosed in the auditor's certificates to be
submitted to RBI on quarterly and annual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly disclosed in the auditor's certificates to be submitted to rbi on quarterly and annual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the list of merchants onboarded by it to the bank where it is maintaining the escrow account and update the list prior to initiating settlement
controls.control_description:
PA shall submit the list of merchants onboarded by it to the bank where it is
maintaining the escrow account and update the list prior to initiating settlement to
these merchants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the list of merchants onboarded by it to the bank where it is maintaining the escrow account and update the list prior to initiating settlement

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that payments are made only to eligible merchants and for permissible debits or credits as defined under this md
controls.control_description:
The bank shall ensure that payments are made only to
eligible merchants and for permissible debits or credits as defined under this MD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that payments are made only to eligible merchants and for permissible debits or credits as defined under this md

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an exclusive clause in the agreement signed between the pa and the bank maintaining escrow account towards usage of balance in escrow account only
controls.control_description:
There shall be an exclusive clause in the agreement signed between the PA and the
bank maintaining escrow account towards usage of balance in escrow account only
as per the permissible debits or credits as mentioned in Table 1 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an exclusive clause in the agreement signed between the pa and the bank maintaining escrow account towards usage of balance in escrow account only

controls.control_objective: To ensure be operated for 'cash-on-delivery' transactions
controls.control_description: The escrow account shall not be operated for 'Cash-on-Delivery' transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be operated for 'cash-on-delivery' transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be received in the escrow account of the pa (and then transferred to the oca of pa - cb) or directly in oca of the pa - cb
controls.control_description:
Funds for an outward transaction may be received in the escrow account of the PA
(and then transferred to the OCA of PA - CB) or directly in OCA of the PA - CB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be received in the escrow account of the pa (and then transferred to the oca of pa - cb) or directly in oca of the pa - cb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out only by debit to the oca
controls.control_description:
Onward transfer to the foreign merchants shall be carried out only by debit to the
OCA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out only by debit to the oca

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept separate from the escrow account(s) opened for such domestic pa activity
controls.control_description:
In case a PA-CB also engages in domestic PA activity, InCA and OCA shall be kept
separate from the escrow account(s) opened for such domestic PA activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept separate from the escrow account(s) opened for such domestic pa activity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by the authorised entities to the respective regional office of dpss, rbi
controls.control_description:
A certificate, signed by the statutory auditor(s), shall be submitted by the authorised
entities to the respective Regional Office of DPSS, RBI, where registered office of PA
is situated, certifying that the entity has been maintaining balance(s) in the escrow
account(s) in compliance with these instructions, as per periodicity prescribed
in Annexure 2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by the authorised entities to the respective regional office of dpss, rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that balances in both accounts are considered for the above certification and that these are separately mentioned in the certificate
controls.control_description:
In case an additional escrow account is being maintained, it shall be
ensured that balances in both accounts are considered for the above certification and
that these are separately mentioned in the certificate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that balances in both accounts are considered for the above certification and that these are separately mentioned in the certificate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted separately for domestic activity, i
controls.control_description:
The certificates shall be
submitted separately for domestic activity, i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted separately for domestic activity, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effected in a time-bound manner without impacting the payment cycle to merchants, under advice to rbi
controls.control_description:
In case there is a need to shift the escrow account from one bank to another, the
same shall be effected in a time-bound manner without impacting the payment cycle
to merchants, under advice to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effected in a time-bound manner without impacting the payment cycle to merchants, under advice to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be part of the 'net demand and time liabilities' (ndtl) for the purposes of maintenance of reserve requirements
controls.control_description:
For banks, the outstanding balance in the escrow account shall be part of the 'net
demand and time liabilities' (NDTL) for the purposes of maintenance of reserve
requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be part of the 'net demand and time liabilities' (ndtl) for the purposes of maintenance of reserve requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed on the basis of balances appearing in the books of the bank as on the date of reporting
controls.control_description:
This position shall be computed on the basis of balances appearing in
the books of the bank as on the date of reporting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be computed on the basis of balances appearing in the books of the bank as on the date of reporting

controls.control_objective: To ensure be routed back through the escrow account unless the refund is directly managed by the merchant and the payer has been made aware of the same, in term
controls.control_description:
Credits towards reversed transactions (where funds are received by PA) and refund
transactions shall be routed back through the escrow account unless the refund is
directly managed by the merchant and the payer has been made aware of the same,
in terms of the contract between a PA and merchant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be routed back through the escrow account unless the refund is directly managed by the merchant and the payer has been made aware of the same, in term

controls.control_description:
The chargeback rights of
customers, as applicable, shall remain unaffected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain unaffected

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be valid and shall be deemed to have been granted under this md
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal as aforementioned, all authorisation / approvals
granted, actions taken, and acknowledgements issued under the aforesaid circulars/
Directions shall continue to be valid and shall be deemed to have been granted under
this MD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be valid and shall be deemed to have been granted under this md

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to have been in force until the date of coming into effect of this md
controls.control_description:
The circulars, directions and guidelines so repealed shall be deemed to have been
in force until the date of coming into effect of this MD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to have been in force until the date of coming into effect of this md

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out comprehensive security risk assessment of their people, it, business process environment, etc
controls.control_description:
Information Security Governance: The entities at a minimum shall carry out
comprehensive security risk assessment of their people, IT, business process environment,
etc., to identify risk exposures with remedial measures and residual risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out comprehensive security risk assessment of their people, it, business process environment, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be presented to the board
controls.control_description:
Reports on risk assessment, security compliance posture,
security audit reports and security incidents shall be presented to the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be presented to the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented
controls.control_description:
Data Security Standards: Data security standards and best practices like PCI-DSS, PCI-
SSF, latest encryption standards, transport channel security, etc., shall be implemented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented

controls.control_objective: To ensure report security incidents / card holder data breaches to rbi within the stipulated timeframe to rbi
controls.control_description:
Security Incident Reporting: The entities shall report security incidents / card holder data
breaches to RBI within the stipulated timeframe to RBI.

controls.control_description:
Monthly cyber security incident
reports with root cause analysis and preventive actions undertaken shall be submitted to

controls.control_description:

Committee quarterly internal and annual external audit reports;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to carry out and submit to the it committee quarterly internal and annual external audit reports

Information Security: Board approved information security policy shall be reviewed

controls.control_description:

The Board level IT

The Committee shall assist

controls.control_objective: To ensure have well defined objectives and actions
controls.control_description:
It

controls.control_description:
The model shall facilitate optimal creation, use
and sharing of information by a business, in a way that it maintains integrity, and is flexible,

controls.control_description:

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to select encryption algorithms which are well established international standards and which have been subjected to rigorous scrutiny by an international

controls.control_objective: To ensure be collected, investigated and analysed for proactive identification of security alerts
controls.control_description:
Forensic Readiness: All security events from the entities infrastructure including but
not limited to application, servers, middleware, endpoint, network, authentication events,
database, web services, cryptographic events and log files shall be collected, investigated
and analysed for proactive identification of security alerts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be collected, investigated and analysed for proactive identification of security alerts

controls.control_objective: To ensure take preventive measures to ensure storing data in infrastructure that do not belong to external jurisdictions
controls.control_description:
Data Sovereignty: The entities shall take preventive measures to ensure storing data
in infrastructure that do not belong to external jurisdictions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take preventive measures to ensure storing data in infrastructure that do not belong to external jurisdictions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered to prevent unauthorised access to the data
controls.control_description:
Appropriate controls shall be
considered to prevent unauthorised access to the data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered to prevent unauthorised access to the data

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an outsourcing agreement providing 'right to audit' clause to enable the entities / their appointed agencies and regulators to conduct security aud
controls.control_description:
Data Security in Outsourcing: There shall be an outsourcing agreement providing 'right
to audit' clause to enable the entities / their appointed agencies and regulators to conduct
security audits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an outsourcing agreement providing 'right to audit' clause to enable the entities / their appointed agencies and regulators to conduct security aud

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit annual independent security audit reports to the entities
controls.control_description:
Alternatively, third parties shall submit annual independent security audit
reports to the entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit annual independent security audit reports to the entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be developed as per pci- ssf guidelines and complied with as required
controls.control_description:
Payment Application Security: Payment applications shall be developed as per PCI-
SSF guidelines and complied with as required.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be developed as per pci- ssf guidelines and complied with as required

controls.control_objective: To ensure review pci-dss compliance status as part of merchant onboarding process
controls.control_description:
The entities shall review PCI-DSS
compliance status as part of merchant onboarding process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review pci-dss compliance status as part of merchant onboarding process

controls.control_objective: To ensure be stored within the database or the server accessed by the merchant
controls.control_description:
2.1 The customer card credentials shall not be stored within the database or the server
accessed by the merchant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be stored within the database or the server accessed by the merchant

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given
controls.control_description:
2.2 Option for ATM PIN as a factor of authentication for card not present transactions shall
not be given.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply
controls.control_description: 2.3 Instructions on storage of payment system data, as applicable to PSOs, shall apply.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to original method of payment unless specifically agreed by the customer to credit an alternate mode
controls.control_description:
2.4 All refunds shall be made to original method of payment unless specifically agreed by
the customer to credit an alternate mode.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to original method of payment unless specifically agreed by the customer to credit an alternate mode

controls.control_objective: To ensure encompass all relevant areas of information system processes and applications
controls.control_description:
The scope of audit shall encompass all relevant areas of information system
processes and applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to encompass all relevant areas of information system processes and applications
